allow: PowerShell($javap = Join-Path $env:JAVA_HOME "bin\\javap.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $javap\)\) { $javap = \(Get-Command javap -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; & $javap -classpath "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\org\\springframework\\data\\spring-data-redis\\4.1.0\\spring-data-redis-4.1.0.jar" org.springframework.data.redis.serializer.GenericJacksonJsonRedisSerializer | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($mvnCmd = \(Get-Command mvn\).Source; Write-Output "mvn: $mvnCmd"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Java|jdk|Zulu|Temurin|Eclipse" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
